name: Panelle with Lemon Peppered Almonds
recipeIngredient: 1 bn Italian parsley, finely chopped -- to yield 1/4 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4- to 6-quart saucepan, dissolve chick pea flour and salt in 3 cups cold water.
2. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until the consistency resembles cream of wheat, about 20 minutes.
3. Stir in chopped parsley and spread the mixture onto a cookie sheet, flattening it to about 1/2-inch thick. Allow to cool.
4. Using a water glass, cut into 2-1/2-inch rounds and set aside.
5. In a 12- to 14-inch saute pan, heat almonds, black pepper, sea salt, and lemon zest over medium-high heat.
6. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted and infused with lemon fragrance. Set aside.
7. Heat oil in a tall frying pan to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
8. Fry chick pea disks 4 to 5 at a time until golden brown, about 30 to 45 seconds.
9. Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with the almond mixture. Serve warm.
Yield: 6 servings
